subject: Re: Fwd: New condo
body:
a new llc

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

> Peg advised me, based upon her conversation with
> Walter Novembre, that ASW  
> is going to purchase a condo for the security person
> "Hash" to live in.   Hash 
> will be paid by LHW, not corporate.  Walter wants to
> know what entity  or 
> person will be the purchaser of the Condo.  The
> purchase will be soon,  so Peg 
> needs to know asap.
> 
> I found out the following additional information
> from Peg:
>  
> The property to be purchased is in New Albany or
> Gahanna, which is  adjacent. 
>  The purchase price is $349,000 for a residence of
> 2300  square feet, not 
> including the basement.  The entity that owns
> Walter's  House, which is very 
> close, is 6975 Morse Road, LLC, which is the address
> of  Walter's house.  The 
> entity which owns Jim Forsbach's house is 5273 
> Settlement Drive LLC, which is 
> also Forsbach's address.  The entity  which owns the
> house purchased for LHW's 
> cousin 10 to 12 years ago is 1990  Family Property
> Trust A (which owns all the 
> autos).
>  
> Questions:
>  
> 1.    Do you want one of the foregoing existing 
> entities to be the purchaser?
>  
> 2.    If not, do you have some other pre-existing 
> entity or some other 
> person in mind to be the purchaser?
>  
> 3.    If not, do you want me to form a separate LLC
> to  purchase the 
> property?  
>  
> 4.   If so,  What name?  
>  
> 5.    What jurisdiction?  The entities which own 
> Walter's house and 
> Forsbach's house are both Ohio LLCs.
>  
> 6.    Who will be the owner of the LLC interests?  
> LHW is the sole owner of 
> the interests in the respective LLCs that own
> Walter's  house and Forsbach's 
> house.  Should LHW, ASW, both, or some other person 
> own the LLC interests?
>  
> Please advise 
> 
> Darren
> > Date: Mon, 05 Dec 2005 13:20:51 -0500
> To: DKIESQ@aol.com
> From: Peg Ugland <pegu@naproperty.com>
> Subject: Re: New condo
> 
> Darren,
> It is in New Albany or Gahanna, which is adjacent. 
> It is $349,000 and 2300 
> square feet, not including the basement.  The entity
> that owns Walter's 
> House, which is very close is 6975 Morse Road, LLC,
> which is his 
> address.  The entity which owns Jim Forsbach's house
> is 5273 Settlement 
> Drive LLC, which is also his address.  The entity
> which owns his cousin's 
> house is 1990 Family Property Trust A (which owns
> all the autos).
> Peg
> 
> 
> At 12:56 PM 12/5/2005 -0500, you wrote:
> >Peg,
> >
> >Where is the condo located, what is the size and
> what is the price?  Which 
> >entities in that locale, if any, purchase real
> property for LHW for use by 
> >Staff?
> >
> >Darren
>

body_html:
a new llc

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

Peg advised me, based upon her conversation with
Walter Novembre, that ASW
is going to purchase a condo for the security person
"Hash" to live in. Hash
will be paid by LHW, not corporate. Walter wants to
know what entity or
person will be the purchaser of the Condo. The
purchase will be soon, so Peg
needs to know asap.

I found out the following additional information
from Peg:

The property to be purchased is in New Albany or
Gahanna, which is adjacent.
The purchase price is $349,000 for a residence of
2300 square feet, not
including the basement. The entity that owns
Walter's House, which is very
close, is 6975 Morse Road, LLC, which is the address
of Walter's house. The
entity which owns Jim Forsbach's house is 5273
Settlement Drive LLC, which is
also Forsbach's address. The entity which owns the
house purchased for LHW's
cousin 10 to 12 years ago is 1990 Family Property
Trust A (which owns all the
autos).

Questions:

  1. Do you want one of the foregoing existing

entities to be the purchaser?

  1. If not, do you have some other pre-existing

entity or some other
person in mind to be the purchaser?

  1. If not, do you want me to form a separate LLC

to purchase the
property?

  1. If so, What name?

  2. What jurisdiction? The entities which own

Walter's house and
Forsbach's house are both Ohio LLCs.

  1. Who will be the owner of the LLC interests?

LHW is the sole owner of
the interests in the respective LLCs that own
Walter's house and Forsbach's
house. Should LHW, ASW, both, or some other person
own the LLC interests?

Please advise

Darren

Date: Mon, 05 Dec 2005 13:20:51 -0500
To: DKIESQ@aol.com
From: Peg Ugland pegu@naproperty.com
Subject: Re: New condo

Darren,
It is in New Albany or Gahanna, which is adjacent.
It is $349,000 and 2300
square feet, not including the basement. The entity
that owns Walter's
House, which is very close is 6975 Morse Road, LLC,
which is his
address. The entity which owns Jim Forsbach's house
is 5273 Settlement
Drive LLC, which is also his address. The entity
which owns his cousin's
house is 1990 Family Property Trust A (which owns
all the autos).
Peg

At 12:56 PM 12/5/2005 -0500, you wrote:

Peg,

Where is the condo located, what is the size and
what is the price? Which
entities in that locale, if any, purchase real
property for LHW for use by
Staff?

Darren
